newService.title: New Request
newService.selectServiceType: What request would you like to make
newService.subtitle: Create a new request
newService.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your request in your preferred language...
newService.descriptionHelp: You can write in any language. The AI will translate and generate a title.
newService.freetextDescription: For any other concerns or requests
newService.participationMoneyDescription: Financial support for personal needs and social participation during detention (pocket money)
newService.bookingsFinanceDescription: Transfer of house money/own money/bridge money, main purchase, payment for day release
newService.personalPropertyDescription: Receive personal items from cell, exchange clothing or write down phone numbers
newService.visitDescription: Visit registration, visit entry, visit coordination, video visit, long-term visit
newService.conversationDescription: Request for appointments with prison management, work inspector or foreign affairs officer
newService.leisureEducationDescription: Game group, church service, parent training, father-child group, social training, library, hairdresser, sports card
newService.healthDescription: Requests for conversations with doctor, pastor, deacon or psychologist as well as for social training, anti-aggression training
newService.counselingSupportDescription: Probation officer, court clerk/ÖRA, debt counseling, ex-offender assistance, transition management
newService.workSchoolDescription: Application for work activity or educational advancement (work assignment, work change, participation in educational programs, exemption from work duty, exemption from work-free days)
newService.prisonRelaxationDescription: Application for relaxation of detention, exemption from detention and day release
newService.packageDescription: Application for approval and acceptance of a package delivery
newService.participationMoneyInfo: Please select the month for which you want to apply for allowance.
newService.participationMoneyMonthHelp: Select the month for which you want to submit the allowance request.

readyPopup.message: I have collected all the necessary information for your request. Would you like to go to the request review now?

aiTranslator.title: AI Text Translation
aiTranslator.description: Enter your text in any language. AI will translate it to German and generate a suitable title.
